requirementCueLines: Once accepted into the Business School, general business students must complete the following courses for graduation.
30 credits of upper-division Business courses. Check with program advisors for list of approved courses.
5 credits TBUS 400 Business Policy and Strategic Management
Elective credits to bring total to 180
